title: SCP When Day Breaks
description: This datapack is a recreation of the ever popular SCP:001, or "When Day Breaks".  This pack is a guaranteed challenge for most, as it makes going out into the sun fatal.  Good luck to anybody who wants to try it :D
body:
## Info:
Do you guys love SCPs, specifically when day breaks. If so then this datapack is for you!

This pack adds SCP 001 (When day breaks) into minecraft, to trigger the event you need to click the bottom text in the reload message, after that you have three days to prepare.

Anything that's outside when it happens will melt into a blob, these blobs drop edible meat, can phase through certain blocks, and can occasionally absorb﻿ projectiles.

If you want to go outside you can either wait for a storm, craft special armor, or use a potion of regeneration.

Lastly, in order to survive you will need to be careful, smart, and ﻿lucky.
Goodluck, and remember "fear the light, embrace the darkness﻿"

### Extra Credits:
Big thanks to timberforge for the custom mobs tutorial, and Galsergey for the custom screen overlay
